cabinAbsolutePressure.status: published land-vehicle pressure-altitude fit drives runtime; pressure rate was not measured

carbonMonoxidePhysiology.fieldSetting: fully enclosed armored motor vehicles with live-fire CO exposure
carbonMonoxidePhysiology.model: CFK-derived MIL-STD-1472H integrated equation, activity level 2
carbonMonoxidePhysiology.status: externally field-validated exposure and recovery kinetics drive runtime

fullScaleVehicleFire.status: measured HRR and aggregate soot/CO yields drive runtime; closed-cabin transfer remains uncalibrated

parkedCabinInfiltration.source: Knibbs, de Dear and Atkinson, Field study of air change and flow rate in six automobiles (2009)
parkedCabinInfiltration.status: runtime value is inside the real parked-vehicle envelope; pressure equalization is not fitted

smokeOptics.source: Mulholland and Croarkin, Specific extinction coefficient of flame generated smoke (2000)
smokeOptics.status: experimentally anchored optical coefficient; vehicle source and deposition are not calibrated

thermoregulation.humidityExerciseProtocol: 11 trained males, 60 minutes at 31 C, 70% VO2max and 23-71% RH
thermoregulation.passiveHeatProtocol: 41 males, randomized crossover, 60 minutes seated at 39.6 C/50.8% RH or 21.2 C/41.9% RH
thermoregulation.passiveHeatSource: Malcolm et al., Frontiers in Physiology 9:585, 2018
thermoregulation.status: directional core/skin and humidity-response gate plus 37.0/33.7 C resting constraint; evaporative parameters are explicit but not cohort-fitted

vehicleSmokeDeposition.source: Ott, Klepeis and Switzer, J Expo Sci Environ Epidemiol 18 (2008)
vehicleSmokeDeposition.status: vehicle smoke deposition law drives runtime; cigarette PM2.5 transfer to fire soot is an applicability boundary

calibrated: full-scale ICE-vehicle HRR trajectory and aggregate soot/CO yields
externallyValidatedModels: CFK-derived MIL-STD-1472H AL2 COHb exposure and recovery kinetics
vehicle smoke deposition k=1.3a mass-balance law
physicsBasedNotDatasetCalibrated: exterior-fire effluent transfer into the closed cabin
inter-zone smoke transport and transfer of cigarette-PM deposition law to fire soot
individualized CFK physiology outside the validated AL2 young-male cohort

source.experiment: d: closed parked sedan, five continuous hours
